flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Gustavus Adolphus College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3k → 1.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Gustavus Adolphus College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (74.3% → 63.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Gustavus Adolphus College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($50.5k → $56.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Gustavus Adolphus College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($50.5k → $56.1k).
